## Card Benefits and Features
### Cashback Benefits
  * 5% CashBack every month on spends on PayZapp, EasyEMI, and SmartBuy
  * 5% CashBack every month on ticket bookings via IRCTC.
  * 5% CashBack monthly on fuel, grocery, bill payments, and mobile recharge
  * Combined CashBack is capped at ₹150 per month for the mentioned categories.
  * Recharges with mobile purchases or at mobile outlets aren’t eligible for 5% cashback. No cashback on wallet loading, rent payments, or government transactions. Rewards/cashback eligibility is based on the transaction’s Merchant Category Code.
  * Only eligible MCCs by RuPay for select categories earn 5% rewards.
  * No rewards/cashback on MCCs outside fuel, groceries, IRCTC, and recharges.
  * For detailed terms and conditions, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/personal-mitc).
  * Get up to 10% CashBack on Flight and Hotel bookings, Gift Vouchers and more via [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://myoffers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/home).


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/bharat-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Fuel Benefits
  * 1% fuel surcharge waiver on minimum transaction of ₹400.
  * Maximum waiver of ₹250 per statement cycle.


![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
Reward Benefits-
  * Link your HDFC Bank Bharat Credit Card on PayZapp.
  * Extra cashback and Reward Points on bill payments and mobile recharge.  
₹1,000 CashBack on in-app shopping on 200+ brands.
  * Securely pay without the hassle of OTPs with ‘Swipe to Pay.’


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/bharat-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## More about Bharat Credit Card
  1. ### Card Controls via myCards
  2. ### Card Control and Redemption
  3. ### Credit and Safety
  4. ### Fees & Renewal
  5. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


#  Card Controls via MyCards 
  * **Single Interface  
**One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, Fastag and Consumer Durable Loans 


  * **Spends tracking  
**Simple interface to track all your spends 


  * **Reward Points  
**View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Management and Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Control and Redemption 
  * 1 Reward Point = ₹1


  * CashBack will be credited as reward points in the next statement.


  * Redemption of cashback against the statement balance is available on request.


  * Unredeemed reward points expire after 2 years of accumulation.


  * With effect from 1st February 2023,  
  

    * Reward Points redemption is capped at 3,000 points per month. 
    * Redeem up to 70% of product/voucher value with points; pay the rest via Credit Card.


[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/claim-rewards) for further details on the process to redeem Reward Points. 
![Card Control and Redemption](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Credit and Safety 
  * Revolving Credit is available at a nominal interest rate. (Check [the fees and charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/bharat-credit-card/fees-and-charges) section for more details).


  * Get Up to 50 days of interest-free credit from the date of purchase.


  * The offer is subject to the submission of the charge by the merchant.


  * Stay protected against unauthorised use when you shop anywhere with EMV Chip Card technology.


![Credit and Safety](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Fees & Renewal 
  * Joining / Renewal Membership Fee – Rs. 500/- Plus Applicable Taxes
  * To view all the fees and charges applicable on your Bharat Credit Card, go to 'Manage Your Credit Cards -> Personal MITC'
  * Goods and Services Tax (GST)
  * Effective 1st July 2017 Service Tax , KKC & SBC of 15% is replaced by Goods&Service Tax (GST) at 18%
  * The applicable GST would be dependent on place of provision (POP) and place of supply (POS).If POP and POS is in the same state then applicable GST Would be CGST and SGST/UTGST else, IGST.
  * GST For FEE & Charges / Interest transactions Billed on statement date will reflect in next month statement.
  * GST levied will not be reversed on Any dispute on Fee & Charges / interest.
  * For card sourced effective 01-11- 2020, Below T&Cs are applicable 


Note*: The Bank reserves the right to cancel the Card in case the Card remains inactive and is not used for effecting any transaction for a continuous period of 6 (Six) months after prior written notice sent on the email address and/or phone number and/or communication address, registered in the records of the Bank.
[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/bharat-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to know more Fees & Charges
![Validity](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  Is there an interest-free period with the HDFC Bank Bharat Credit Card?
Absolutely! Enjoy an interest-free period of up to 50 days from the date of purchase, adding value to your financial transactions.
###  What is the HDFC Bank Bharat Credit Card, and how is it different from the HDFC Bank Bharat Cashback Card?
The HDFC Bank Bharat Credit Card is a versatile financial tool, often called the HDFC Bank Bharat CashBack Card. It offers a fuel surcharge waiver, a generous credit limit, and an interest-free period.
###  Are there any renewal fees for the HDFC Bank Bharat Credit Card, and can rewards points offset these fees?
Yes, there is a renewal fee. However, the reward points accumulated with each transaction can be redeemed, reducing or offsetting the renewal fee.
###  How can I apply for the HDFC Bank Bharat Credit Card online?
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank Bharat Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other credit cards that may suit your needs. Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
